name: io.github.IamRamgarhia/memorybridge
description: Cross-tool AI memory MCP server. One .ai-memory.md per project, shared by Claude Code, Cursor, Antigravity, Windsurf, Gemini CLI, Continue, and VS Code Copilot. Default load is ~400 tokens (vs 2,000-5,000 typical). Plain Markdown, zero vector DB, atomic writes. Emits AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / .cursorrules / .windsurfrules / GEMINI.md from one source with banner+hash overwrite protection.
